name: Loyal Loans
description_short: Loyal Loans is a personal loan lender located in Oklahoma City offering financing for various personal needs. Licensed and locally operated with standard business hours.
description_long:
Loyal Loans operates as a personal loan provider based in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma. The company maintains a physical storefront at 12325 N May Ave and serves the local market with traditional lending services. They are reachable by phone at (405) 775-0171 and maintain an online presence through their website loyalloansllc.com.

Based on the available information, Loyal Loans offers personal loans typical of regional lenders in their category. The company operates during standard business hours Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM, suggesting a traditional brick-and-mortar lending operation rather than a fully digital platform. This local presence indicates customers can visit in person for applications and service.

The company's primary distinguishing factor is its established local presence in the Oklahoma City market. As a regional lender rather than a national platform, Loyal Loans may offer personalized service and faster decision-making for local borrowers familiar with the area.

A significant limitation is the lack of detailed public information about loan terms, interest rates, approval requirements, or specific loan products offered. The Waze business listing provides minimal detail beyond contact information and hours. Prospective borrowers would need to contact the company directly or visit their website to understand loan amounts, eligibility criteria, APRs, and repayment terms—all critical factors in evaluating a personal loan provider.
address: 16309 N Santa Fe Ave, Edmond, OK 73013

company_info.headquarters: 16309 N Santa Fe Ave, Edmond, OK 73013

pros: Established local lender with physical storefront in Oklahoma City
Standard business hours (Mon-Fri 9 AM-5 PM) allow for in-person service
Maintains own website (loyalloansllc.com) for business information
Regional presence suggests potential familiarity with local lending market
cons: Minimal public information available about loan products, rates, or terms
No online application or details about approval timeline
Limited digital presence compared to national lenders
No information about loan amounts, APR ranges, or eligibility requirements
Closed weekends and evenings, limiting accessibility for some borrowers
best_for: Oklahoma City-area residents who prefer in-person lending relationships
Borrowers seeking a local lender with established community presence
Customers willing to contact directly to discuss personalized loan options
diagnosis: Loyal Loans is best suited for Oklahoma City borrowers who value local, in-person service and are willing to call or visit to learn about loan terms and availability. The main caveat is the lack of publicly available information about rates, terms, and specific products—borrowers must contact the company directly to make informed comparisons.
